title: Asian AI startups launch Mythos-like  models as Anthropic’s export ban drags on
snippet: New models are launching in Asia that promise Mythos-like capabilities without fear of an export ban. U.S. AI labs may never recover this enormous market.

title: Trump Admin releases Anthropic  Mythos to be used by more than 100 US companies, agencies
snippet: Over 100 companies and government agencies are reportedly authorized to use Mythos 5, including their non-American employees.
